subTaskTemplate.name: Obtain Quote
subTaskTemplate.description: Obtain Quote – Obtain appraisal fee quote (conditional: property value over $1M or unique/complex property type)

subTaskTemplate.name: Create Invoice
subTaskTemplate.description: Create Invoice – Generate the appraisal invoice for the borrower to pay

subTaskTemplate.name: Send Invoice
subTaskTemplate.description: Send Invoice – Send the appraisal invoice to the borrower (conditional: intent to proceed received or HELOC product)

subTaskTemplate.name: Payment Recording
subTaskTemplate.description: Payment Recording – Record appraisal payment received in Encompass and ValueLink (these systems do not sync)

subTaskTemplate.name: Automated Order
subTaskTemplate.description: Automated Order – Place automated appraisal order (conditional: automated ordering must be enabled for this loan); marking Done will place the automated order

subTaskTemplate.name: Order 1004
subTaskTemplate.description: Order 1004 – Order 1004 appraisal form (conditional: single-family property; automated ordering not available)

subTaskTemplate.name: Order 1025
subTaskTemplate.description: Order 1025 – Order 1025 appraisal form (conditional: 2–4 unit property; automated ordering not available)

subTaskTemplate.name: Order 1073
subTaskTemplate.description: Order 1073 – Order 1073 appraisal form (conditional: condo property; automated ordering not available)
